$comment: Single source of truth for the SessionScore. Claude reads this during a session (CLAUDE.md Step 3b), the evaluator validates against it, and the report/diff tools consume it. Every scorecard.json records a hash of this file, so a re-test can tell whether a score moved because the SITE changed or the RULER (these weights/anchors) changed.

weights.$comment: SessionScore = success*w + efficiency*w + (seq/7)*w + (intent/7)*w + (confidence/7)*w. Must sum to 1.0 — the loader enforces this.

result.$comment: Observed task-success values by outcome (ISO 9241-11 effectiveness).

likert.$comment: Shared 1-7 anchors for all three self-report items. Claude states these to the persona before asking, and the persona's baseline skepticism shapes the answer.

anchors.1: I'd close the tab and never come back / never recommend this
anchors.4: Neutral. No strong feeling either way.
anchors.7: Best site I've used for this kind of product.

items.intent: Would you take the next step (demo / signup / share with team)?
items.confidence: How confident are you that you actually found / understood what you were looking for?
